case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. ROXAN BARTOLO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-03-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED JAN-03-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARTOLO, ROXAN AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-03-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT BARTOLO, ROXAN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-14-2011
NOTICE OF HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE OF PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
